narrative:
Phillipsburg (precinct in Montgomery County) has 322 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 21.4 percentage points.
